description.en: A wafer-thin Gujarati flatbread rolled almost translucent, then roasted slowly over low heat and pressed continuously until every trace of moisture cooks out. What remains is bone-dry and shatteringly crisp, a keeper snack for tea, chutney or travel.
description.de: Ein hauchdünnes Fladenbrot aus Gujarat, fast durchsichtig ausgerollt, bei niedriger Hitze geröstet und ständig gepresst, bis jede Feuchtigkeit verkocht ist. Knochentrocken und knusprig, ein Vorratssnack für Tee, Chutney oder unterwegs.
description.es: Un pan plano de Gujarat fino como una oblea, estirado casi transparente y asado despacio a fuego bajo, presionado sin parar hasta cocinar toda la humedad. Queda reseco y crujiente, un bocadillo de reserva para el té, el chutney o los viajes.
description.fr: Un pain plat du Gujarat fin comme une feuille, étalé presque transparent puis grillé lentement à feu doux et pressé sans relâche jusqu'à évaporer toute humidité. Galette sèche et croustillante, collation de réserve pour le thé, le chutney ou le voyage.

origin.note: Traditionally made from leftover roti dough to avoid waste; spiced versions add cumin, turmeric, chili powder or fenugreek (methi) leaves.

keeping.note: Its whole reason for being: keeps crisp for weeks in an airtight container at room temperature, no refrigeration needed.

method.title: Mix dough
method.summary: Combine whole wheat flour, oil and salt, then knead in water to a soft, smooth dough. Rest 30 minutes.

method.title: Roll paper-thin
method.summary: Roll each ball out as thin as possible, almost translucent, into a 6-7 inch round.

method.title: Initial roast
method.summary: Place on a tawa over low flame and roast one side about a minute, then flip.

method.title: Press dry
method.summary: Press continuously with a wooden khakhra press or folded cloth in circular motions, flipping occasionally, until all moisture cooks out and both sides crisp with light brown spots.

method.title: Cool and store
method.summary: Cool completely (it crisps further as it cools), then keep in an airtight container.

source.adaptation: Hydration recalibrated to a standard chapati ratio (~60%) since the source gave only a vague liquid amount; pieceGrams reduced from raw dough weight for moisture loss, as with knäckebröd.
